Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Hmm, this is a complex request that requires generating thoughtful questions about a detailed smartphone supply chain process. The user wants open-ended, thought-provoking questions covering rationale, improvements, risks, decisions, communication, and metrics.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The BPMN structure shows multiple parallel paths and decision points, so I should craft questions that explore the interconnections between these elements. The user specifically mentioned avoiding SQL queries, so I will focus purely on conceptual and strategic aspects.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I can organize the questions into logical categories based on the process stages shown in the diagram. The questions should encourage deep thinking about trade-offs, hidden complexities, and optimization opportunities. Since this is a multinational operation, I should include questions about geopolitical factors and cross-cultural coordination too.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The tone should remain professional yet engaging, matching the technical nature of the BPMN while making the questions accessible. I will aim for variety - some questions about current state challenges, others about future innovations, and a few about underlying assumptions.
